title: Comptonanthus molluginoides
taxonomy: Comptonanthus molluginoides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It belongs to the genus Comptonanthus, which is part of the order Apiales and the class Magnoliopsida. The family Apiaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, including Apioideae, which includes Comptonanthus molluginoides. Comptonanthus molluginoides is native to Australia, specifically the south-western region. The plant's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in the same family and order.
